title: Persisted Invite/Claim UI Context Restore
goal: Restore invite/claim gate and AuthScreen context from persisted tokens when URL params are missing, without auth-core changes.
constraints: No bootstrapThenLoadProfile / get_my_org_context / admin-RPC / paywall-core changes

phases.P1: Analyse: App.tsx token state was URL-only and immutable; clearStaleInviteOnSignIn could wipe storage on login without URL.
phases.P2: Strategy: resolveInviteAndClaimTokensForRouting (invite before claim); web sync peek; native async hydrate + spinner gate.
phases.P3: Implementation: inviteToken.ts + modelClaimToken.ts peek*Sync; App.tsx setters, conditional mark*FlowFromUrl, effectiveRole AuthScreen fix.
phases.P4: Compatibility: finalizePendingInviteOrClaim unchanged; success banner unchanged.
